# tplinkeasysmart_port_storm_control (Resource)

Manage one switch port's storm-control rate and enabled storm types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_storm_control" "port2" {
  port_id     = 2
  enabled     = true
  rate_kbps   = 1000
  storm_types = ["broadcast", "multicast"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether storm control is enabled for the port.
- `port_id` (Number) Physical switch port number.
- `rate_kbps` (Number) Total rate limit in Kbps. Use `0` when `enabled = false`.
- `storm_types` (Set of String) Storm types included in the limit. Supported values are `ul_frame`, `multicast`, and `broadcast`. Use an empty set when `enabled = false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from port_id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_port_storm_control.port2
  id = "2"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_storm_control" "port2" {
  port_id     = 2
  enabled     = true
  rate_kbps   = 1000
  storm_types = ["broadcast", "multicast"]
}
```
